user.title: Add AIO Energy Management
user.description: Select the type of entity to create

data_description.entry_type: Choose between cheapest hours sensor or calendar entity

cheapest_hours_data_provider.title: Price source
cheapest_hours_data_provider.description: Select one price source for cheapest hours calculation. Choose Nord Pool (custom integration), Nord Pool official, Entso-E, or Strømligning (Danish total price).

data_description.data_provider_type: Select the integration that provides electricity price data

data_description.nordpool_entity: Entity ID from Nord Pool custom integration
data_description.mtu: Market time unit in minutes (15 or 60)
data_description.allow_dynamic_entities: Enable dynamic entity selections in configuration steps (number of slots, trigger hour, price limit, offset entities)

cheapest_hours_nordpool_official.title: Nord Pool official configuration
cheapest_hours_nordpool_official.description: Configure Nord Pool official integration settings

data_description.nordpool_official_config_entry: Configuration entry from Nord Pool official integration
data_description.area: Market area for Nord Pool official integration
data_description.mtu: Market time unit in minutes (15 or 60)
data_description.allow_dynamic_entities: Enable dynamic entity selections in configuration steps (number of slots, trigger hour, price limit, offset entities)

data_description.entsoe_entity: Average price sensor entity ID from Entso-E integration
data_description.mtu: Market time unit in minutes (15 or 60)
data_description.allow_dynamic_entities: Enable dynamic entity selections in configuration steps (number of slots, trigger hour, price limit, offset entities)

cheapest_hours_stromligning.title: Strømligning configuration
cheapest_hours_stromligning.description: Configure Strømligning entity settings. Strømligning provides Danish electricity prices including spot price, transport tariffs, and VAT.

data_description.stromligning_entity: Sensor entity providing today's prices (e.g., sensor.stromligning_current_price_vat)
data_description.stromligning_tomorrow_entity: Binary sensor entity providing tomorrow's prices (e.g., binary_sensor.stromligning_tomorrow_available_vat)
data_description.allow_dynamic_entities: Enable dynamic entity selections in configuration steps (number of slots, trigger hour, price limit, offset entities)
data_description.mtu: Market time unit in minutes (15 or 60). Must match your Strømligning integration configuration

cheapest_hours_price_source.title: Price source
cheapest_hours_price_source.description: Select one price source for cheapest hours calculation. Choose Nord Pool entity (custom integration), Nord Pool official config entry ID, Entso-E entity, or Strømligning entity.

data.nordpool_official_config_entry: Nord Pool official config entry ID

data_description.nordpool_entity: Entity ID from Nord Pool custom integration
data_description.nordpool_official_config_entry: Configuration entry ID from Nord Pool official integration
data_description.entsoe_entity: Average price sensor entity ID from Entso-E integration

data_description.name: Friendly name for the entity
data_description.number_of_slots: Static number of time slots to find (matches selected MTU). Leave at 0 to use entity instead
data_description.number_of_slots_entity: Optional: Entity to dynamically set number of slots (sensor or input_number). Overrides static value if set
data_description.starting_today: Include hours from today in calculation

data_description.failsafe_starting_hour: Fallback hour if price data unavailable
data_description.inversed: Find most expensive hours instead of cheapest
data_description.trigger_hour: Static: Earliest hour to create next cheapest hours
data_description.trigger_hour_entity: Optional: Entity to dynamically set trigger hour (sensor or input_number). Overrides static value if set
data_description.price_limit: Static: Only accept prices below this value (or above if inversed)
data_description.price_limit_entity: Optional: Entity to dynamically set price limit (sensor or input_number). Overrides static value if set
data_description.calendar: Show this entity in the calendar
data_description.mtu: Market time unit in minutes (15 or 60)
data_description.retention_days: Number of days to keep calendar history
data_description.area: Market area for Nord Pool official integration
data_description.price_modifications: Jinja2 template for price modifications (e.g., tariffs, taxes)
data_description.use_offset: Enable time offset configuration for start and end times

cheapest_hours_offset.title: Time offset
cheapest_hours_offset.description: Configure optional start and end time offsets

data_description.start_hours: Static: Hours to add to start time
data_description.start_hours_entity: Optional: Entity to dynamically set start hours offset (sensor or input_number). Overrides static value if set
data_description.start_minutes: Static: Minutes to add to start time
data_description.start_minutes_entity: Optional: Entity to dynamically set start minutes offset (sensor or input_number). Overrides static value if set
data_description.end_hours: Static: Hours to add to end time
data_description.end_hours_entity: Optional: Entity to dynamically set end hours offset (sensor or input_number). Overrides static value if set
data_description.end_minutes: Static: Minutes to add to end time
data_description.end_minutes_entity: Optional: Entity to dynamically set end minutes offset (sensor or input_number). Overrides static value if set

excess_solar_global.title: Excess solar – global settings
excess_solar_global.description: Configure the global settings for excess solar management

data_description.name: Friendly name for this excess solar entry
data_description.sensor: Sensor reporting grid import/export power. Negative values mean solar export
data_description.buffer: Minimum excess power (W) required before activating a device

excess_solar_device.title: Excess solar – device {device_number}
excess_solar_device.description: Configure a device to manage with excess solar power

data_description.name: Friendly name for this device
data_description.consumption: Static power consumption in watts (used for budget check). Leave at 0 if using entity
data_description.consumption_entity: Optional: sensor that reports current consumption in watts. Overrides static value if set
data_description.is_on_schedule: Optional: binary sensor that is `on` when this device runs on its own schedule
data_description.minimum_on_time: Minimum time in minutes the device must stay on before the manager can turn it off
data_description.minimum_off_time: Optional minimum minutes the device must stay off before it can turn on again; omit to use the integration default

data_description.add_another: Enable to configure another power device

error.multiple_price_sources: Please select only one price source
error.both_slots_configured: Please configure only one: either static value or entity, not both
error.no_slots_configured: Please configure at least one: either static value (greater than 0) or entity
error.number_of_slots_negative: Number of slots must be 0 or greater
error.first_hour_out_of_range: First hour must be between 0 and 23
error.last_hour_out_of_range: Last hour must be between 0 and 23
error.both_trigger_hour_configured: Please configure only one: either static trigger hour or entity, not both
error.both_price_limit_configured: Please configure only one: either static price limit or entity, not both
error.failsafe_starting_hour_out_of_range: Failsafe starting hour must be between 0 and 23
error.trigger_hour_out_of_range: Trigger hour must be between 0 and 23
error.both_start_hours_configured: Please configure only one: either static start hours or entity, not both
error.both_start_minutes_configured: Please configure only one: either static start minutes or entity, not both
error.both_end_hours_configured: Please configure only one: either static end hours or entity, not both
error.both_end_minutes_configured: Please configure only one: either static end minutes or entity, not both
error.start_minutes_out_of_range: Start offset minutes must be between 0 and 59
error.end_minutes_out_of_range: End offset minutes must be between 0 and 59
error.both_consumption_configured: Please configure only one: either static consumption (W) or consumption entity, not both

abort.no_devices_to_remove: No devices are configured for this entry
